omitted_declarations.policy_reference: During service use: device information (model, OS version, device identifier, etc.), IP address, location information, access time, and usage logs
Methods of collection: sign-up and consent flows, events/promotions (with separate consent), automatic collection via partner platforms, and information provided during customer support interactions.
During service use: device information (model, OS version, device identifier, etc.), IP address, location information, access time, and usage logs

We may collect the following information for account registration, customer support, and service
delivery.
•
Required: email address, mobile phone number
• Optional: date of birth, gender
•
•
•
During service use: device information (model, OS version, device identifier, etc.), IP address,
location information, access time, and usage logs
For payments: credit card information, carrier information, purchase history, and other
payment details
For refunds/restores: email address, purchase verification details, and identity verification
information as needed
Methods of collection: sign-up and consent flows, events/promotions (with separate consent),
automatic collection via partner platforms, and information provided during customer support
interactions.
